lines.speaker: Antonius
lines.text: Welcome to the Moonrise Brewery and Winery, the oldest and largest producer of alcohol in all of Varlamore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you tell me more about this place?

lines.speaker: Antonius
lines.text: Of course! The Moonrise Winery was originally opened over 400 years ago by Bracus Ramio.

lines.speaker: Antonius
lines.text: While we originally started off as just a winery, the brewing side of the business was established by Bracus' grandson, Ludovic, when he created the now famous sunbeam ale!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So it was a family business? Do the family still own it today?

lines.speaker: Antonius
lines.text: Unfortunately not. Ludovic found himself in a tragic and unexpected wine-related incident before ever having children himself. After his death, the business was taken over by a collective.

lines.speaker: Antonius
lines.text: That's right. Some of the most influential people all across Varlamore have a stake in the Moonrise Brewery and Winery these days, though most prefer to stay anonymous.

lines.speaker: Antonius
lines.text: Ah, well their reasoning is something only they know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Thanks for the information.

lines.speaker: Antonius
lines.text: Not at all. Now, is there anything else I can do for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better be on my way.
